ANNOUNCEMENT: We will have a system upgrade activity on July 25, 2026. The following will be temporarily unavailable: Metrobank Debit/Prepaid cards, Paycard, ATMs, Cash Accept Machines, Withdrawal Deposit Machines, Metrobank App and Online site, MBOS, and Remittance services. Plan your transactions ahead.​​

    Other Remarks

    Physical Status
    • Bank has full control of the property
    • With stay-in caretaker
    Legal Status

    No Legal issue

    Document Status
    • With documentary problem/issue
    • Notice of Levy on Attachment
    • Title bears annotation on Writ of Attachment, Civil Case No. R-PSY-10-04228, RTC Branch 119, Pasay City

    Disclaimer

    1
    All properties are sold on "AS-IS WHERE IS" and "NO RECOURSE" basis. No warranties.
    2
    Prices are NOT applicable to buyback and redemption by former owners. For buyback and redemption transaction, please contact the assigned Marketing Officer.
    3
    Prices are subject to change without prior notice and properties may be removed from the list for any reason Management deems appropriate.
    4
    The list may reflect properties sold without the knowledge of AAMDD. For immediate correction, kindly advide AAMDD of such fact if identified.
    5
    Inadvertent misprints shall not alter the properties factual condition nor shall be deemed as misrepresentation on the properties.
    6
    If multiple offers are received for the same property, bidding shall be conducted and the property shall be awarded to the highest bidder subject to client risk assessment.
    7
    Mere submission of an Offer to Buy does not grant Buyer "first option" or "first right" to the purchase the property
    8
    The Bank only shoulders Creditable Withholding Tax (CWT) up to purchase price. Excess CWT and all other taxes and expenses for the transfer of titles are for buyer's account
    9
    The deficiencies of the property are not meant to be exhaustive, comprehensive or complete. Buyers are advised to conduct their own independent due diligence prior to making an offer.
    10
    The list is an intellectual property of Metrobank. However, the Bank is not in any way liable if this shall be copied, reproduced, altered and/or tampered for any activities other than the purpose of marketing properties contained in it.

    For more details, please contact:

    Got questions? We can help.

    For inquiries, you may call our Metrobank Contact Center at (02) 88-700-700, or our domestic toll-free number at 1-800-1888-5775, or send an e-mail to customercare@metrobank.com.ph

    Metrobank is regulated by the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas Website: https://www.bsp.gov.ph

    Deposits are insured by PDIC up to P1 Million per depositor.
